category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Difftastic as a structural diff tool comparing files based on syntax.
source_facts.description says it is a diff that understands syntax.
display_name_sources: Official README uses the product name Difftastic.
source_facts.name provides the package id difftastic.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the Difftastic manual for installation, configuration, language support, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Wilfred/difftastic, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes structural syntax-based comparison and git compatibility.
